message:
Add .gitignore for Zig/Node.js/WASM project

Ignore build artifacts (dist/, zig-out/, .zig-cache/),
dependencies (node_modules/, deps/), and OS/editor files.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+# Zig build artifacts
+zig-out/
+.zig-cache/
+zig-cache/
+
+# Node.js
+node_modules/
+package-lock.json
+
+# Build output (generated by build scripts)
+dist/
+
+# Dependencies (fetched/vendored, not source-controlled)
+deps/
+
+# OS files
+.DS_Store
+*~
+*.swp
+*.swo
+
+# Log files
+*.log
